title: liparis loeselii subsp. orientalis
intro: Liparis loeselii subsp. orientalis, also known as the oriental twayblade, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Liparis loeselii subsp. orientalis include its potential to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to harness its medicinal properties.
